revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月十九]][[zh:四月十九]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 19|qq=April 19}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1612|en|1612|qid=Q6771|lt=1612|1=1612}} {{ill|May 19|en|May 19|qid=Q2578|lt=May 19|1=May 19}}) – Monk {{ill|Tenkai|en|Tenkai|qid=Q1142310|lt=Tenkai|1=Tenkai}} met with {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1701|en|1701|qid=Q6814|lt=1701|1=1701}} {{ill|May 26|en|May 26|qid=Q2586|lt=May 26|1=May 26}}) – {{ill|Akō Castle|en|Akō Castle|qid=Q601598|lt=Akō Castle|1=Akō Castle}} was handed over to the bakufu {{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. Due to a wound inflicted by the head of the {{ill|Akō Domain|en|Akō Domain|qid=Q1062196|lt=Akō Domain|1=Akō Domain}}, {{ill|Asano Naganori|en|Asano Naganori|qid=Q2866316|lt=Asano Naganori|1=Asano Naganori}}, the {{ill|Asano Family|ja|浅野家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asano Family|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 浅野氏|1=Asano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2659895}} became extinct. * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 12th year (Intercalary April) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1800|en|1800|qid=Q6875|lt=1800|1=1800}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|qid=Q2617|lt=June 11|1=June 11}}) – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|en|Inō Tadataka|qid=Q1240937|lt=Ino Tadataka|1=Inō Tadataka}} departed Edo to survey {{ill|Ezo|en|Ezo|qid=Q1040184|lt=Ezo|1=Ezo}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year (Intercalary April) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|qid=Q2618|lt=June 9|1=June 9}}) – The Meiji government banned the sale and smoking of {{ill|Opium|ja|阿片|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Opium|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アヘン|1=Opium|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q46452}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|qid=Q2620|lt=June 6|1=June 6}}) – Horseback riding, previously reserved for samurai since the feudal era, was permitted to the general public. == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Jiryaku|en|Jiryaku|qid=Q934365|lt=Jiryaku|1=Jiryaku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1068|en|1068|qid=Q19421|lt=1068|1=1068}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Reizei|en|Emperor Go-Reizei|qid=Q356060|lt=Emperor Gōrei|1=Emperor Go-Reizei}}, a 70‐year-old {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|1025|en|1025|qid=Q19267|lt=1025|1=1025}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1606|en|1606|qid=Q6747|lt=1606|1=1606}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}}) – {{ill|Yagyū Munetoshi|en|Yagyū Munetoshi|qid=Q724287|lt=Yagyū Muneyoshi|1=Yagyū Munetoshi}}, a Kenjutsu and {{ill|Shinkage-ryū|en|Shinkage-ryū|qid=Q1288891|lt=Shinkage-ryū|1=Shinkage-ryū}} master (born {{ill|1527|en|1527|qid=Q6412|lt=1527|1=1527}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|18|4|20|3|19|5|4|0419|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十九]] {{translated page|ja|4月19日 (旧暦)|version=82617673|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:4 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:April 19 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 4월 19일]] [[ja:4月19日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月十九]]
[[ar:April 19 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- In the entry for [[:en:Kitaro Nishida|Nishida Kitarō]], it is noted (in the lunisolar calendar) as May 19. --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十九]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十九]]
{{wikidata link|Q839333}} [[Category:Days]] [[Category:旧暦4月]]
